name: bd-formation
description: > Use this skill whenever asked how to register or start a business in Bangladesh as a freelancer or small business. Trigger on phrases like \"register TIN Bangladesh\", \"trade licence Bangladesh\", \"how to start freelancing Bangladesh legally\", \"sole proprietorship Bangladesh\", \"RJSC company\", \"BIN VAT registration\". Covers TIN and trade-licence registration, the sole proprietor / partnership / company choice, VAT (BIN) registration, and the e-commerce DBID. ALWAYS read before any Bang
author: openaccountants
